segments.text: Ever been told you don't qualify for something, and never told why? Meet Batayan: a reasoning agent that decides what you're entitled to, and proves it. Built on Microsoft Foundry, with Foundry I-Q.
segments.caption: Batayan — AI that argues with receipts

segments.text: Watch it reason. Liza asks if she qualifies for a scholarship. Batayan breaks the question into six atomic rules, and cites a receipt for each one. Verdict: eligible, and proven.
segments.caption: Beat 1 — Yes, with receipts

segments.text: Mateo fails just one rule, the income cap. Batayan shows the receipt, the single fix, and refers him to a grant he does qualify for.
segments.caption: Beat 2 — No, because of one rule (+ referral)

segments.text: And Aisha left out her income. Batayan refuses to guess. It abstains, and tells her exactly what's missing. That refusal is the product.
segments.caption: Beat 3 — It abstains, never bluffs

segments.text: It shows its work, and never bluffs. Batayan: because every answer deserves a basis.
segments.caption: Because every answer deserves a basis.
